$comment: The ONLY file you hand-edit. Keyed by slug (= repo name, or a custom slug for source:manual entries). Holds the human-authored fields; sync.mjs merges these over the GitHub-derived data. Any repo carrying the 'portfolio' topic but missing here is flagged as 'needs enrichment'. See SCHEMA.md for field semantics.

moto-routes.title: Moto Routes
moto-routes.description: Platform to discover, save and share motorcycle routes, with interactive maps and community features.

scenic-routes-simple.title: Scenic Routes
scenic-routes-simple.description: MVP that maps the best scenic national roads in Portugal on an interactive map.

streamlit-sales-dashboard.title: Sales Dashboard
streamlit-sales-dashboard.description: Streamlit web app for exploring sales data with interactive filters and KPI visualizations.

doc-chatbot-multi-llm.title: Multi-LLM Doc Chatbot
doc-chatbot-multi-llm.tagline: Analyze TXT and PDF documents with multiple LLMs
doc-chatbot-multi-llm.description: Chatbot that analyzes TXT and PDF documents using several Large Language Models, comparing their responses.

streamlit-data-analysis-chatbot.title: Data Analysis Chatbot
streamlit-data-analysis-chatbot.description: Simple chatbot for data analysis and visualization using PandasAI and OpenAI.

ibm-hr-analytics.title: IBM HR Analytics
ibm-hr-analytics.tagline: Exploratory analysis of HR attrition data
ibm-hr-analytics.description: Exploratory Data Analysis of the IBM HR Analytics dataset using R, from the Cegid Academy Data Science Program.

motogp-analytics.title: MotoGP Analytics
motogp-analytics.description: Notebooks exploring MotoGP World Championship data and rider/constructor performance.

sql-murder-mystery.title: SQL Murder Mystery
sql-murder-mystery.description: Solution to Knight Lab's SQL Murder Mystery: interrogating a relational database with SQL to find the culprit.
